common.passwordMinimum: Password must be at least 8 characters.

layout.caption1: Major ISPs do not always choose routes based on the lowest latency. Cost, interconnection agreements, and commercial routing policies can also affect where your packets go.
layout.caption2: During daily peak hours, Taiwan's academic network often approaches its capacity limit, affecting connection quality to some overseas websites, academic databases, and cloud services.
layout.caption3: Did you know? Submarine cables are only a few centimeters thick, yet they carry almost all communications between Taiwan and the rest of the world.
layout.caption4: Did you know? More than 99% of global international data traffic is still carried by submarine cables.
layout.caption5: Did you know? Vietnam once had 3 of its 5 international submarine cables fail at the same time, making access to overseas services difficult.
layout.metaDescription: Access the Netstamp distributed network observability console.
